name: Cuban Navy Bean Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the beans and combine with water and bay leaf. Simmer for 1 to 1 1/2 hours. Add additional water if necessary.
2. Heat olive oil in a skillet and cook garlic and onion for 6 minutes.
3. Add tomatoes and cook for an additional 10 minutes.
4. When the beans are tender, add the tomato mixture, potato, saffron, salt, pepper, cumin, cabbage, and squash to the beans. Cook for another 30 minutes, adding more water if necessary.
5. Serve garnished with parsley.
